def negative_closure_captures_loop_variable_without_binding():
    rule_id = "closure_captures_loop_variable_without_binding"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag closures created in loops that capture the loop variable without binding the current value."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
